name: DoubleTree by Hilton Putrajaya Lakeside
address: 2, Jalan P5-5, Presint 5, Putrajaya, Kuala Lumpur, Malaysia
description:
Khám Phá Sự Sang Trọng Tại DoubleTree by Hilton Putrajaya Lakeside, Kuala Lumpur

Nằm bên bờ hồ thơ mộng của Putrajaya, DoubleTree by Hilton Putrajaya Lakeside mang đến trải nghiệm lưu trú đẳng cấp với không gian sang trọng và tiện nghi hiện đại. Khách sạn mở cửa đón khách từ 16:00 chiều, giúp bạn có đủ thời gian thư giãn và chuẩn bị cho những ngày khám phá thành phố xung quanh. Với phong cách thiết kế tinh tế và dịch vụ chuyên nghiệp, nơi đây là điểm đến lý tưởng cho cả du khách nghỉ dưỡng và doanh nhân.

Khách sạn còn đặc biệt thân thiện với gia đình khi cho phép trẻ em từ 6 đến 17 tuổi lưu trú miễn phí, tạo điều kiện thuận lợi cho các gia đình có nhiều thế hệ đi cùng nhau. Thời gian trả phòng linh hoạt đến 12:00 trưa, giúp bạn dễ dàng sắp xếp hành trình của mình một cách thuận tiện và thoải mái. Đến với DoubleTree by Hilton Putrajaya Lakeside, bạn sẽ được trải nghiệm dịch vụ hoàn hảo trong không gian yên bình và đẳng cấp.

Tiện Nghi Giải Trí Đẳng Cấp Tại DoubleTree by Hilton Putrajaya Lakeside

Tại DoubleTree by Hilton Putrajaya Lakeside, khách hàng không chỉ được tận hưởng không gian nghỉ dưỡng sang trọng mà còn có cơ hội thư giãn và vui chơi tại các tiện nghi giải trí đa dạng. Quầy bar cao cấp là điểm đến lý tưởng để thưởng thức những loại đồ uống tinh tế trong không khí thoải mái, sang trọng, phù hợp cho các buổi gặp gỡ bạn bè hoặc thư giãn sau một ngày dài. Không gian quầy bar được thiết kế tinh tế, mang lại cảm giác ấm cúng và thân thiện, giúp khách hàng dễ dàng thư giãn và tận hưởng khoảnh khắc tuyệt vời bên người thân yêu.

Ngoài ra, khách còn có thể khám phá các quầy quà lưu niệm và cửa hàng đặc sản, nơi trưng bày và bán các món đồ độc đáo, mang đậm nét văn hóa địa phương cũng như những món quà ý nghĩa để làm kỷ niệm hoặc tặng người thân. Các tiện ích này không chỉ giúp khách hàng có thêm trải nghiệm vui vẻ mà còn làm phong phú thêm hành trình lưu trú tại khách sạn, đem lại cảm giác thoải mái, tiện nghi và tràn đầy cảm hứng.

Tiện Nghi Thể Thao Đẳng Cấp Tại DoubleTree by Hilton Putrajaya Lakeside

Tại DoubleTree by Hilton Putrajaya Lakeside, du khách có thể tận hưởng các hoạt động thể thao và giải trí ngay trong khuôn viên khách sạn với trung tâm thể hình hiện đại và đầy đủ trang thiết bị. Phòng tập fitness rộng rãi, trang bị các thiết bị tập luyện tiên tiến, giúp bạn duy trì phong độ và sức khỏe trong suốt kỳ nghỉ của mình. Đặc biệt, khách còn có thể thư giãn bên hồ bơi ngoài trời tuyệt đẹp, nơi lý tưởng để thưởng thức ánh nắng mặt trời và thư giãn sau những giờ tập luyện hoặc công việc bận rộn. Với những tiện nghi thể thao này, DoubleTree by Hilton Putrajaya Lakeside cam kết mang đến trải nghiệm nghỉ dưỡng vừa thư giãn, vừa năng động cho mọi khách hàng.

Tiện Nghi Tiện Lợi Tại DoubleTree by Hilton Putrajaya Lakeside

Tại DoubleTree by Hilton Putrajaya Lakeside, du khách sẽ được trải nghiệm các dịch vụ tiện ích đa dạng nhằm mang lại sự thoải mái và thuận tiện tối đa trong kỳ nghỉ của mình. Dịch vụ giặt ủi chuyên nghiệp giúp bạn luôn giữ gìn trang phục sạch sẽ, trong khi dịch vụ phòng 24/7 mang đến sự tiện lợi trong việc thưởng thức ẩm thực ngay tại phòng theo ý muốn. Ngoài ra, khách còn có thể yên tâm về sự an toàn của tài sản cá nhân nhờ vào các hộp an toàn được trang bị sẵn trong phòng. Các dịch vụ hỗ trợ khác như dịch vụ trông giữ hành lý, dịch vụ concierge tận tình, cửa hàng tiện lợi và dọn phòng hàng ngày đều góp phần nâng cao trải nghiệm của bạn tại khách sạn. Tất cả những tiện ích này đều được thiết kế để đáp ứng mọi nhu cầu của khách, giúp chuyến đi của bạn trở nên dễ dàng, thoải mái và trọn vẹn hơn bao giờ hết.

Tiện nghi vận chuyển tại DoubleTree by Hilton Putrajaya Lakeside

DoubleTree by Hilton Putrajaya Lakeside cung cấp nhiều tiện nghi vận chuyển để đáp ứng nhu cầu của khách hàng. Khách sạn có bãi đỗ xe rộng rãi, cho phép khách tự đỗ xe một cách dễ dàng. Tuy nhiên, khách sạn sẽ tính phí đỗ xe cho việc sử dụng bãi đỗ xe này.

Tiện Nghi Phòng Nghỉ Sang Trọng tại DoubleTree by Hilton Putrajaya Lakeside

Phòng tại DoubleTree by Hilton Putrajaya Lakeside được trang bị đầy đủ các tiện nghi cao cấp để mang đến trải nghiệm thoải mái tối đa cho khách lưu trú. Bạn có thể thư giãn với chiếc tivi hiện đại, thưởng thức các món đồ uống từ mini bar hoặc tận hưởng không khí trong lành qua ban công hoặc sân thượng riêng biệt. Đặc biệt, phòng còn có các đồ dùng vệ sinh cá nhân chất lượng cùng mái che chắn ánh sáng hoàn hảo nhờ rèm chắn sáng, giúp bạn có những giấc ngủ ngon lành dù bất kỳ thời điểm nào trong ngày. Ngoài ra, khách còn được phục vụ trà miễn phí để bắt đầu ngày mới thật sảng khoái và dễ chịu.

Trải Nghiệm Ẩm Thực Đẳng Cấp Tại DoubleTree by Hilton Putrajaya Lakeside

Tại DoubleTree by Hilton Putrajaya Lakeside, du khách sẽ được thưởng thức đa dạng các món ăn ngon miệng tại nhà hàng sang trọng của khách sạn. Thực đơn phong phú, từ các món địa phương đặc trưng đến những món quốc tế tinh tế, đều được chuẩn bị kỹ lưỡng để mang đến trải nghiệm ẩm thực tuyệt vời. Đặc biệt, buffet sáng hàng ngày tại khách sạn là điểm nhấn, cung cấp một loạt các món ngon, tươi mới để bắt đầu ngày mới tràn đầy năng lượng.

Ngoài ra, dịch vụ phòng 24/7 mang đến sự tiện lợi tối đa cho khách hàng, cho phép bạn thưởng thức các món ăn yêu thích ngay tại phòng riêng của mình bất cứ lúc nào. Đội ngũ nhân viên dọn phòng luôn sẵn sàng đảm bảo không gian nghỉ ngơi của bạn luôn sạch sẽ và thoải mái, giúp bạn có những phút giây thư giãn hoàn hảo sau một ngày dài khám phá thành phố. Với sự kết hợp hoàn hảo giữa dịch vụ và ẩm thực, DoubleTree by Hilton Putrajaya Lakeside cam kết mang đến trải nghiệm ẩm thực đáng nhớ cho mọi khách hàng.

Khám Phá Các Loại Phòng Đa Dạng Tại DoubleTree by Hilton Putrajaya Lakeside

Tại DoubleTree by Hilton Putrajaya Lakeside, du khách có nhiều lựa chọn phòng nghỉ phù hợp với nhu cầu và sở thích của mình. Từ phòng Twin Guest rộng 31 mét vuông với hai giường đơn, đến các phòng cao cấp như King Deluxe Room hay King Executive Room, đều mang đến không gian thoải mái để thư giãn. Những căn phòng này không chỉ mang lại sự tiện nghi mà còn giúp bạn tận hưởng khung cảnh tuyệt đẹp của hồ nước và cảnh quan xung quanh.

Ngoài ra, khách hàng còn có thể lựa chọn các loại phòng đặc biệt như phòng King Family, suite cao cấp như King Deluxe Suite hoặc King Lake View Suite, hoặc các căn phòng rộng rãi như King 2 Bedroom Suite, phù hợp cho gia đình hoặc nhóm bạn đông người. Đặt phòng qua Agoda không chỉ giúp bạn có được mức giá tốt nhất mà còn mang lại trải nghiệm đặt phòng đơn giản, nhanh chóng và không gây phiền hà, để bạn có thể tập trung tận hưởng kỳ nghỉ của mình một cách trọn vẹn.

Khám phá Putrajaya - Thiên đường nghỉ dưỡng bên hồ ở Kuala Lumpur, Malaysia

Putrajaya, thành phố mới của Malaysia, nằm cách trung tâm Kuala Lumpur khoảng 25 km về phía nam. Được xây dựng trên một hòn đảo nhân tạo, Putrajaya nổi tiếng với kiến trúc hiện đại, hệ thống giao thông tiện lợi và không gian xanh rộng lớn. 

DoubleTree by Hilton Putrajaya Lakeside tọa lạc tại vị trí đắc địa bên bờ hồ Putrajaya, nơi du khách có thể tận hưởng khung cảnh tuyệt đẹp của hồ và công trình kiến trúc độc đáo. Khách sạn này cung cấp các phòng nghỉ sang trọng và tiện nghi hiện đại, đảm bảo sự thoải mái tuyệt đối cho du khách. 

Ngoài ra, với vị trí thuận lợi, du khách có thể dễ dàng khám phá các điểm tham quan nổi tiếng ở Putrajaya như Cầu Seri Wawasan, Văn phòng Thủ tướng Malaysia và Quảng trường Độc lập. Khách sạn cũng cung cấp các dịch vụ và tiện ích cao cấp như hồ bơi, trung tâm thể dục và nhà hàng phục vụ các món ăn đa dạng từ các nền văn hóa khác nhau. DoubleTree by Hilton Putrajaya Lakeside là sự lựa chọn lý tưởng cho những ai muốn khám phá Putrajaya và tận hưởng không gian nghỉ dưỡng tuyệt vời.

Đến DoubleTree by Hilton Putrajaya Lakeside từ sân bay gần Kuala Lumpur

DoubleTree by Hilton Putrajaya Lakeside tọa lạc tại Putrajaya, Kuala Lumpur, Malaysia, và có nhiều lựa chọn để đến từ sân bay gần đó. Với vị trí thuận lợi, khách sạn cung cấp dịch vụ đón tiễn sân bay và các phương tiện di chuyển khác để đảm bảo sự thuận tiện cho khách hàng.

Sân bay quốc tế Kuala Lumpur (KLIA) là sân bay lớn nhất gần Kuala Lumpur. Để đến DoubleTree by Hilton Putrajaya Lakeside từ KLIA, bạn có thể sử dụng dịch vụ đón tiễn sân bay của khách sạn hoặc sử dụng dịch vụ taxi. Quãng đường từ KLIA đến khách sạn khoảng 30 phút.

Ngoài ra, khách có thể chọn sân bay quốc tế Kuala Lumpur 2 (KLIA2) làm điểm đến. Để đến DoubleTree by Hilton Putrajaya Lakeside từ KLIA2, bạn cũng có thể sử dụng dịch vụ đón tiễn sân bay của khách sạn hoặc sử dụng dịch vụ taxi. Quãng đường từ KLIA2 đến khách sạn cũng khoảng 30 phút.

Với sự lựa chọn linh hoạt và dịch vụ chuyên nghiệp, việc đến DoubleTree by Hilton Putrajaya Lakeside từ sân bay gần Kuala Lumpur trở nên dễ dàng và thuận tiện cho khách hàng.

Khám phá các điểm đến gần DoubleTree by Hilton Putrajaya Lakeside

DoubleTree by Hilton Putrajaya Lakeside nằm gần một số điểm đến hấp dẫn tại Kuala Lumpur, Malaysia. Cách khách sạn chỉ một quãng đi bộ ngắn, bạn có thể đến Đại học Putra Malaysia, một trong những trường đại học hàng đầu của Malaysia. Ngoài ra, Telaris Sinergi Sdn Bhd cũng nằm gần đây, là một công ty công nghệ hàng đầu tại khu vực.

Nếu bạn muốn khám phá văn hóa và lịch sử địa phương, hãy ghé thăm Muzium Warisan Melayu UPM / Malay Heritage Museum. Đây là một bảo tàng thú vị với các hiện vật và triển lãm về văn hóa Mã Lai. Đài tưởng niệm Thiên niên kỷ cũng nằm gần đó, là một điểm đến thú vị để tìm hiểu về lịch sử và kiến trúc độc đáo của Putrajaya.

Nếu bạn muốn tận hưởng không gian xanh và tạo dựng sức khỏe, hãy tới Nature Interpretation Center hoặc Sports Field - Nexus International School Malaysia. Đây là những nơi lý tưởng để tham gia các hoạt động thể thao và khám phá thiên nhiên. Cuối cùng, bạn có thể ghé qua Primavera, một quán cà phê và nhà hàng gần khách sạn, để thưởng thức các món ăn ngon và thư giãn sau một ngày dài khám phá.

Vị trí thuận lợi gần các trạm công cộng tại DoubleTree by Hilton Putrajaya Lakeside

DoubleTree by Hilton Putrajaya Lakeside nằm ở vị trí đắc địa gần hai trạm công cộng quan trọng là Nhà ga ERL Putrajaya và Nhà ga bến xe Putrajaya Sentral. Với vị trí này, khách sạn này là một điểm xuất phát lý tưởng để khám phá Kuala Lumpur và vùng lân cận. 

Nhà ga ERL Putrajaya cung cấp dịch vụ tàu điện nhanh, giúp du khách dễ dàng di chuyển đến các điểm du lịch nổi tiếng như Tháp đôi Petronas và Quảng trường Merdeka. Từ đây, bạn có thể dễ dàng kết nối với các tuyến tàu điện nhanh khác để khám phá Kuala Lumpur và các khu vực lân cận.

Ngoài ra, Nhà ga bến xe Putrajaya Sentral cung cấp dịch vụ xe buýt và xe khách, giúp du khách dễ dàng di chuyển đến các địa điểm khác nhau trong thành phố và các khu vực xung quanh. Với sự thuận tiện này, khách sạn DoubleTree by Hilton Putrajaya Lakeside là một lựa chọn lý tưởng cho du khách muốn khám phá Kuala Lumpur một cách dễ dàng và tiện lợi.

Những nhà hàng xung quanh DoubleTree by Hilton Putrajaya Lakeside

DoubleTree by Hilton Putrajaya Lakeside có vị trí thuận lợi với nhiều nhà hàng nổi tiếng trong khu vực. Bạn có thể thưởng thức các món ăn ngon tại Seoul Garden @ Alamanda Shopping Centre, The Everly Putrajaya, Mohd Chan Restaurant @ Bandar Baru Bangi, Restoran d' Limau Nipis IKAN BAKAR SEGAR BANGI, Mohd Chan Restaurant @ Putrajaya, Nasi Lemak Royale Kedah, Restoran Dapur Jiran, Texas Chicken Malaysia, D Fish Signature và Restoran Habeeb Maju. Với sự đa dạng về lựa chọn và chất lượng cao, bạn sẽ không bao giờ cảm thấy nhàm chán khi tìm kiếm những món ăn ngon trong khu vực này.

Khám phá các địa điểm mua sắm xung quanh DoubleTree by Hilton Putrajaya Lakeside

DoubleTree by Hilton Putrajaya Lakeside nằm trong khu vực gần nhiều địa điểm mua sắm phổ biến. Khách sạn chỉ cách Butik Zaida và DuBook Press vài bước chân. Nếu bạn muốn có trải nghiệm mua sắm đa dạng, Trung tâm mua sắm Alamanda Putrajaya và Trung tâm mua sắm IOI City cũng chỉ cách đó khoảng một quãng đường ngắn. Với sự tiện lợi này, du khách có thể dễ dàng khám phá và tận hưởng những trung tâm mua sắm nổi tiếng của Putrajaya.

Giá phòng trung bình tại DoubleTree by Hilton Putrajaya Lakeside

Với giá phòng trung bình là $81, DoubleTree by Hilton Putrajaya Lakeside là một sự lựa chọn tuyệt vời cho du khách muốn trải nghiệm sự sang trọng và tiện nghi tại Kuala Lumpur, Malaysia. So với giá phòng trung bình tại thành phố này là $58, khách sạn DoubleTree by Hilton Putrajaya Lakeside mang lại sự đáng giá vượt trội cho khách hàng. Với mức giá hợp lý, khách sạn này cung cấp không chỉ một trải nghiệm nghỉ dưỡng tuyệt vời mà còn tiện ích và dịch vụ chất lượng cao.

Khách hàng hài lòng với DoubleTree by Hilton Putrajaya Lakeside

DoubleTree by Hilton Putrajaya Lakeside đã nhận được nhiều đánh giá tích cực từ khách hàng. Với đội ngũ nhân viên thân thiện và nhiệt tình, khách hàng đã cảm thấy rất thoải mái và được hỗ trợ tận tình. Khách hàng cũng rất hài lòng với bữa sáng tuyệt vời và khung cảnh xung quanh đẹp mắt của khách sạn. Một khách hàng còn nói rằng anh ấy sẽ giới thiệu khách sạn này cho bạn bè và sẽ quay lại lần nữa. 

Ngoài ra, khách hàng cũng đánh giá cao sự thân thiện và tận tâm của đội ngũ nhân viên. Một khách hàng cho biết anh ấy đã có một kỳ nghỉ vui vẻ và hạnh phúc tại đây, đặc biệt là trẻ em rất thích bể bơi. Đội ngũ nhân viên không chỉ đẹp mà còn rất hữu ích và thân thiện. Khách hàng cũng rất hài lòng với dịch vụ nhà hàng và phòng rộng lớn, đặc biệt là nếu đi cùng gia đình có trẻ nhỏ. DoubleTree by Hilton Putrajaya Lakeside là một lựa chọn tuyệt vời cho kỳ nghỉ gia đình.

Kỳ nghỉ tuyệt vời tại DoubleTree by Hilton Putrajaya Lakeside

DoubleTree by Hilton Putrajaya Lakeside là một khách sạn tuyệt vời ở Kuala Lumpur, Malaysia, được đánh giá cao bởi khách hàng. Với điểm số tổng thể 9.1/10, khách sạn này đảm bảo mang đến cho du khách một kỳ nghỉ đáng nhớ và thoải mái.

Khách sạn này được đánh giá 8.9/10 về giá trị, cho thấy đây là một lựa chọn tốt cho những ai muốn trải nghiệm một kỳ nghỉ sang trọng mà không cần phải chi trả quá nhiều. Với các tiện nghi đẳng cấp và dịch vụ chuyên nghiệp, DoubleTree by Hilton Putrajaya Lakeside đáng giá mỗi đồng bạn bỏ ra.

Khách sạn này cũng được đánh giá cao về sạch sẽ (9.2/10) và tiện nghi (9.2/10). Với kiến trúc hiện đại và không gian thoáng đãng, khách sạn mang đến cho du khách một môi trường sống lý tưởng. Bên cạnh đó, đội ngũ nhân viên tại đây cũng được đánh giá 9.2/10 về hiệu suất làm việc, đảm bảo sự phục vụ tận tâm và chuyên nghiệp cho du khách. Với tất cả những đánh giá tích cực này, DoubleTree by Hilton Putrajaya Lakeside là một sự lựa chọn lý tưởng cho kỳ nghỉ của bạn ở Kuala Lumpur.

sample_comments.title: Địa điểm tuyệt vời để ở lại
sample_comments.response:
Dear Nurasikin,

Thank you so much for the perfect 10/10 rating and for choosing DoubleTree by Hilton Putrajaya Lakeside for your getaway!

We are thrilled to hear that you enjoyed the peaceful atmosphere of our resort, away from the hustle and bustle of the city. It is wonderful to know that our delicious food and "tiptop" cleanliness met your expectations. Knowing that the kids had a great time at the pool and that you highly recommend us to other families truly makes our day!

We look forward to welcoming you and your family back for another relaxing and refreshing stay very soon.

Kind Regards,
DoubleTree by Hilton Putrajaya Lakeside

sample_comments.title: Trên cả tuyệt vời
sample_comments.positives: Excellent everything Â¿Â¿
sample_comments.negatives: Nothing

sample_comments.text:
Tôi vừa đặt phòng suite 2 phòng ngủ tại DoubleTree by Hilton Putrajaya cho một buổi lễ gia đình đặc biệt - sinh nhật lần thứ 3 của cháu trai tôi. Chúng tôi là một nhóm 5 người lớn và 1 trẻ nhỏ, và thời gian lưu trú của chúng tôi thực sự thú vị từ đầu đến cuối.

Phòng suite sạch sẽ, rộng rãi và rất thoải mái, hoàn hảo cho một buổi tụ họp gia đình. Nó cung cấp đủ sự riêng tư và không gian cho mọi người thư giãn, và cách bài trí rất phù hợp cho cả người lớn và trẻ nhỏ.

Chúng tôi cũng đã đặt bữa tối và bữa sáng tại Makan Kitchen, và chúng tôi rất ấn tượng. Bữa tiệc buffet có đủ loại món ăn để phục vụ mọi khẩu vị, và mọi thứ chúng tôi thử đều ngon miệng và được chuẩn bị tốt. Nhân viên thân thiện và chu đáo, làm cho trải nghiệm ẩm thực trở nên tốt hơn nữa.

Môi trường xung quanh khách sạn rất yên bình và hữu tình, góp phần làm tăng bầu không khí thư giãn chung. Nó thực sự làm cho buổi lễ sinh nhật của chúng tôi trở nên đặc biệt và đáng nhớ.

Rất được khuyến khích cho các gia đình đang tìm kiếm một kỳ nghỉ thoải mái và vui vẻ tại Putrajaya. Chúng tôi chắc chắn sẽ quay lại lần nữa!
sample_comments.title: Lễ kỷ niệm sinh nhật tuyệt vời tại DoubleTree by Hilton Putrajaya - Suite 2 Phòng Ngủ
sample_comments.response:
Dear Jamuna,

Thank you for sharing your wonderful review. We're so happy to hear that your nephew's birthday celebration was a special one and that you enjoyed your stay in our 2-Bedroom Suite.

It's great to know the room was comfortable for your family and that you had a pleasant dining experience at Makan Kitchen. We truly appreciate your kind words about our staff and the peaceful environment.

Thank you for recommending us. We look forward to welcoming you and your family back again soon!

Kind Regards,
DoubleTree by Hilton Putrajaya Lakeside

We appreciate you bringing this to our attention and hope for the opportunity to improve in the future.

sample_comments.title: NOT what I Expect from *** Chain
sample_comments.text:
Check in to ***.
Mentioned we want to check in at 3pm cause we arrive between 11-12pm
Say ok, 3pm we arrive, staff "black face" say no room available. Only 4pm.
Then say will give us extra bed. So ok we wait.
3:55pm ask again, room not ready. As we have dinner at 5pm and need to shower 1Adult 2Kids.
4:05pm tell us room ready but the extra bed will put in after we leave the room for dinner. 
We say ok.
Came back 12:27am midnight, No bed was set up. So just talk but no action.
They blame that we put Do Not Disturb, which we didn't and say house keeping just leave after seeing our NDS. But they have my room number and my handphone, wouldn't be hard to just pick up phone and call me xtra bed ready can we bring in? Clearly they forget but just wanna push the blame on us. 
Morning breakfast, was show to our table that is still dirty and wipe properly. The hygiene was really at its lowest. No cutlery set up. Have to ask twice for them to clean the table and bring the cutlery. Mind you breakfast is not cheap ya. Can see the picture, will have rice on the table and oily from previous diner. 
As the only restaurant available at the hotel, we go back for lunch after swimming. Again the staff that greet us like we are criminal. That ugly and unfriendly face really turn us off. Waited 15min no one come take order, my kids have to go ask her to come order. She say wait. Waited another 5-7min before she comes. Order 3 main course, food was so so but hungry so no complain. Just so you know I was with a walking stick and I just had operation. Went counter to pay, guess wha, they only allow Maybank to scan QR. Do not accept any other back if you using phone to pay. I was using CIMB. No card with me just phone for scan or QR. Very fierce say we don't take other card beside Maybank. 2026, your systems is so laid back ? She ask me go back my room take card back here and pay, I say if I am convenient I will but my leg is injured walking abit troublesome. I say put on my room and check out we pay, cannot. Must pay. But I am going to swimming pool, then say can you go back to room at 5pm they will send people there to collect the payment. How am I going to tell you what time I can be back when the kids wanna go swim and do activity. So so so not flexible. My conclusion, for the money you paying, there are many hotel that have better hospitality than ***. Example ***. Top notch service and have every service staff ready with a smile willing to help anytime. If you seek good service and not been greet by black face and unfriendly staff, yah you can try. Will I be back..... doubt so for many many years. But most disappointed, it's under ***Honor. One of the best hotel chain but yet getting this service in ***..... it's a joke.
sample_comments.response: Dear Julian. We're sorry for the issues you faced during your stay. Your feedback is taken seriously, and we'll improve our service. We hope to welcome you again for a better experience.

sample_comments.title: Beautiful property ruined by poor management
sample_comments.positives:
Massive property; built horizontally unlike the vertical hotels in KLCC. Staff is nice and friendly but it seems the management doesn't want you to enjoy the stay.
They have a nice cafe; food is good and very affordably priced.
sample_comments.negatives:
It was my last day in KL and I moved to Putrajya for some work and to be closer to the airport. Big mistake choosing Hilton. I'd stayed at the Hilton KLCC earlier that week; was a wonderful experience. But here, they gave me a dingy room at first, with no natural light. When I requested to change, they said cant do unless you upgrade because no rooms are available. It's a 250-room hotel that was almost empty; I've no idea who they wanted to save up the good rooms for. 
Anyway, the water in the sink wouldn't clear so half an hr later they sent maintainance. Sometime later I saw the shower cabin; it was dirty as hell. 
That's when I just went to the reception and told them to refund if they don't have a room. I'm not paying for this shabby place. 
Magically, new rooms appeared. 
I selected one with much better light. However, now they refused to open the balcony citing safety concerns. The printed ticket on the balcony door says otherwise. 
5-star is not just the property; it's the experience and Hilton Putrajya doesn't seem to want you to enjoy that. Worst ever!

sample_comments.title: Below Expectation
sample_comments.text: On App stated 3PM check-in time, but they said 4PM when I arrived. Staff at the counter wasn't very welcoming also, though other staffs we encountered were friendlier. Room cleaning service was slow. Prior to booking, I requested for baby cot, but wasn't in the room when we check-in. They came with the baby cot while I was napping with the baby. The kids' pool was not very clean, a bit outdated. The baby pool area has some kind of water play which was spoilt. Food is generally okay. Parking was not free!!! You have to pay RM3 every time you drive out. Toilet was clean, but when hot water was turned on, there's some kind of unpleasant smell. Other than that, I like the size of my room - spacious. Though the rain actually went in from the window and the carpet there was constantly wet. Probably won't be back here, sadly.
sample_comments.response:
Dear Shabirah,

Thank you for sharing your feedback with us.

We're sorry to hear that your stay didn't meet your expectations. Please accept our apologies for the delay in check-in, slow room cleaning, and the inconvenience with the baby cot. We understand how important these details are, especially when traveling with young children.

We've also noted your comments about the kids' pool condition, water play area, and parking charges. Your feedback has been shared with our team for improvement.

On a positive note, we're glad you found the room spacious and the toilet clean, though we will investigate the odour and wet carpet issue you mentioned.

We truly appreciate your feedback and hope we'll have the chance to welcome you back for a better experience in the future.

Warm regards,

DoubleTree by Hilton Putrajaya Lakeside

We look forward to welcoming you back soon at DoubleTree by Hilton Putrajaya Lakeside to try to redeem your trust in our hotel and to provide you with a far better service than what you have experienced.

Kind Regards,
DoubleTree by Hilton Putrajaya Lakeside

sample_comments.title: Bad Service!!!
sample_comments.text:
1. Hotel ignored my request. ( Request twin bed & decoration for my child birthday )
2. No greeting from yr staff. Me n my family no give welcome cookies. But others guest all have. Yr staff ignored my question. 
3. My room smell not good(busuk). Yr Hotel public toilet better smell than my room. 
4. Splash pool for kid, facility out and not clean. (Banyak rosak, tapi tidak repair.) This ye call 5star Hotel!!!.
5. I not recommend this Hotel to my friend & family.
6. Yr staff just focus & give best service to foreign guest.
Very sad to ignored guest from yr country. 
6. I will share all feedback to others socmed.
sample_comments.response:
Dear Mr Fazly,
Greetings from DoubleTree by Hilton Putrajaya Lakeside!
I hope this finds you well,
Thank you for taking the time to share about your recent stay experience. We're sorry for falling short in your expectation of us, in particular to your request for your child decoration wasn't granted and unpleasant room smell. Please be informed that we don't have any family room unit that is twin bed and as of our facility our engineering team is actively addressing these concerns to prevent any recurrence in the future. It saddens me that the experience you had with us was not pleasant and that is not something that we pride ourselves with. 
As a token of apology and to also make it right to you. I am offering a one time complimentary upgrade to the next tier for your future.
Please accept our sincerest apologies and we look forward to having you with us again in the near future.

Regards,
Fida
Duty Manager

sample_comments.title: Customer service really bad
sample_comments.text:
The hotel's policy seemed rigid and inflexible. Despite booking a two-bedroom suite for two adults and three kids under 12, they insisted on extra charges for my 7-year-old daughter, just because I forgot to include her in the guest list. After some negotiation, they relented for the first day, but the experience was unpleasant. The next day, I opted to send my helper and daughter for breakfast to avoid further hassle.

Additionally, when I called reception to inquire about my Grab food delivery, the staff rudely directed me to check the lower lobby myself, refusing to assist further. This lack of basic hospitality left me feeling disappointed and frustrated. In my experience, hotels typically accommodate such requests, especially late at night. It's essential for hotels to prioritize customer service, even for small matters. Unfortunately, this hotel fell short in that regard.
sample_comments.response:
Dear Mrs. Roslini,

Thank you for taking the time to share your experience with us. 

Upon investigating your concerns with our Duty Manager Hadi, we have found some discrepancies in the information provided. During check-in, your husband was made aware of the booking arrangements, including the breakfast package for each room. However, there was no further inquiry from your end regarding the breakfast package at that time.

We are deeply sorry for the lack of assistance provided by our staff when you called reception regarding your Grab food delivery. This behavior does not align with our standards of hospitality, and we will address this issue internally to ensure it does not happen again.

We appreciate your feedback as it helps us to identify areas for improvement. Please rest assured that we take your comments and will use them to enhance our service delivery moving forward.

Warm regards,
Syazwan Ibrahim
Assistant Front Office Manager

sample_comments.title: Worst stay in putrajaya
sample_comments.text:
Upon checking in ,our kid was not served a cookie...
N it's their 'trademark ' that they will served guest upon checking in
But since the time we checked in also was quite late..K fine.
Upon reaching E room,we noticed there was used toothbrush n toothpaste frm the previous guest,called recep,they send a housekeeper to send 2 new toothbrush w/o clearing that used toothbrush...the towels has stained too ..
Came the next day we went out requested someone to clean E room..
Came back with sofa not made..pillow not puffed up, toiletries was not top up ..n best the shower gel was literally empty.....called recep again...guess what he said .ohh our housekeeper are foreigner so it's like pointless if we were to send U one now..
Like seriously???!!! Will foreign talent or local talent makes any diff...???
Fine ,me n hub made our way down insisting to talk to whoever in charge..of cz I accept this..cz it's a 5 star hotel..with a branding..went down n it just got worst ..showed him E pixs all n explained to him but his eyes was glued to the comp..he can even said..I'm sorry but I can't offer U anything???.like wow.. he then pushed us to his next am asst manager ..Syazwan.
He said why don't why called n looked for Syazwan..this really pissed me..I said U really have no service Recovery..U r supposed to find Ur guest n not Ur guest come finding you...n the next day came .we don't even see Syazwan 's shadow....
sample_comments.response:
Dear Ms Siti,

I wanted to personally reach out to express my sincere apologies for the disappointing experience you had during your recent stay with us. 

I was truly disheartened to learn about the series of issues you encountered, from the oversight during check-in to the cleanliness and service lapses in your room. Please accept my sincerest apologies for the inconvenience this caused you and your family.

I must acknowledge that after my staff overlooked the comment indicating my availability to meet with you, I attempted to contact you but was unable to reach you. Unfortunately, there was no email provided in your profile, which hindered direct communication. Nevertheless, I am genuinely concerned about your experience and am eager to connect with you personally to discuss how we can Make It Right for you.

We hope to have the opportunity to restore your trust in DoubleTree by Hilton Putrajaya Lakeside.

Warm regards,
Syazwan Ibrahim

sample_comments.title: Not up to par
sample_comments.text:
Stayed in multiple prestige hotels, however as 5 star rated hotel, from my pov unfortunately was not up to par. This review is based on my overall stay throughout in my short staycation in Putrajaya. 

Firstly, the place was really beautiful, very artistic & unique. However there was no proper pavement to shade the customers from rain. There was only a small walkway and the pavement was flooded with rainwater. It's very unsafe especially for the elderly. Noted the walkway on from building Wing 3 was sealed as well. Hence there was no other alternative but to walkthrough the flooded pathway. 

Upon checking in our rooms, noted the fridge was not been cleaned up - there were leftover by the previous guests. We called the careline and noted there was poor command of English by the staff. Spoke in BM informing that peti sejuk tidak dibersihkan pada masa kita check in. Instead of the cleaner, the maintenance staff came to check on us. After that the cleaner came to check on us. 

Roughly 10 pm, their manager Nita contacted us through whatsapp and check on us. In which I informed accordingly and she apologized on behalf and courteously offered complementary breakfast to make things right. Initially I declined as I had meeting scheduled. However she rearranged the breakfast on another day which I really deeply appreciate the effort. 

Overall other than the fridge issue, noted the curtains have stains and furnitures are also full of scratches as well- not sure due to previous guests. Water pressure in the shower was low as well but still managed to bath properly.

Pools are very limited all the children are in the adult pool as well. Overcrowded. Went for their breakfast - the eggs station was the best but unfortunately the hollandaise sauce for the egg Benedict was in curds with oil separation. Hash browns overcooked - it was very tough to chew. Same goes for the chicken Rendang. Pastries are delicious though still warm and crispy. 

The lobby/lounge cafe staff was very f
sample_comments.response:
Dear Lily,

Thank you for taking the time to rate and please accept our sincere apology if your stay was not up to your expectation.
Kindly be assured that we have shared your feedback with our team to improve the experience we offer, 
We hope that what happened will not prevent you from staying with us again and look forward to welcoming you back soon.

Kind Regards,
DoubleTree by Hilton Putrajaya Lakeside

sample_comments.title: Disappointing Stay - Not Recommended for Families with Young Children
sample_comments.text:
My family and I (including a 3-year-old and a 10-month-old) recently stayed at the DoubleTree by Hilton Putrajaya, and unfortunately, it was a major letdown. While the property has potential, the lack of hygiene and poor service made our stay incredibly stressful.

Hygiene Concerns: Ants and Cockroaches
Upon check-in, we found ants all over the kettle and minibar area. I reported this to housekeeping immediately. Shockingly, the staff's first instinct was to blame us, suggesting we had left food out. Fortunately, I had taken photos before we even unpacked, which forced them to drop the accusations.

Despite "cleaning," the ants returned the next day. It wasn't until the third day---right before our checkout---that they finally offered us a room change. Their "apology" consisted of a few cookies. For a family dealing with an infestation while traveling with an infant, this felt dismissive. To top it off, I spotted a cockroach in the shower on our final day.

Facilities & Kids' Club
The Pool: The kids' pool is extremely cold---far too cold for toddlers or babies to enjoy. Additionally, several water features and activities in the pool area were broken/not working.

Kids' Club: It feels like a 3-star facility. Aside from the PlayStation, there isn't much to keep a child engaged. My son spent very little time there.

Accessibility: The hotel is not stroller-friendly. We struggled to navigate the complex, as there seems to be little thought given to ramps or easy access for families with prams.

Service & Hospitality
The staff were notably indifferent. At the restaurant, staff watched me struggle to enter with two children and a stroller without even attempting to open the door. At check-in, we were simply given keys and pointed in a general direction with no guidance. Even at checkout, bellboys watched us struggle with suitcases and kids without offering a hand.

Dining & Location
Food: The breakfast buffet was mediocre and uninspired. However, I will say the dinner buffet was good with a nice variety of dishes---the only real highlight of our stay.

Location: Be aware that the hotel is isolated. There are no convenience stores or pharmacies nearby; you must drive or take a car just to buy water or snacks.

Final Verdict
The hotel is aging and in desperate need of a renovation. Between the pests, the freezing pool, and the unhelpful staff, it is not a family-friendly destination. If you are traveling with small children, I suggest looking elsewhere.
sample_comments.response: Dear Ainur, Thank you for sharing your feedback. We're very sorry for the issues you experienced and truly appreciate your comments, which will help us improve our rooms, facilities, and service. We hope to welcome you and your family back in the future for a much better experience.

sample_comments.title: Filthy Room and Very Disappointed.
sample_comments.text:
We booked 4 rooms and 1 of the room was filthy and disgusting. The room was basically not cleaned for a new guest. 

The room was a twin and both comforter covers were not replaced from the previous guest. One of them had a perfume smell and the other had a bad body odor. 

Months before our arrivals, we informed DoubleTree that our guests in the 3 rooms would be arriving earlier and we would be arriving late. Upon checking in, the front desk staff inquired passport number for 1 of the guests who arrived earlier. She insisted that we had to provide her with that info before she can us check us in. Why didn't she obtain that information earlier when the guests checked in? 

Also, months earlier we inquired about the private transfer to Genting from Putrajaya. From staff at kulpr_res@hilton.com, we were quoted MYR 450 for 7 passengers van one way. When we called to front desk, the price changed to MYR 486, then when we confronted to the front desk staff, the price changed again to MYR 846. She said we were missed understand that the earlier price was without luggage. How about this is the case of bait and switch? 

I am a Hilton Honor Gold through Amex Platinum and this is how DoubleTree Putrajaya treats their loyal Hilton members if booked through Agoda...
sample_comments.response:

6) makan kitchen ; food 2/5 my rating, morning buffet breakfast starts at 6.30am but when I arrive at 7am still half of the item is not prepared. We were having breakfast the manager just off the light and fan for outside sitting not once but twice. The omelette section cook/chef when ask for omelette just pretend to not see my husband and pretend to be busy. He could have just told us to come back after 10mins or so. Very un professional.
7) koffee; too expensive for nothing.
8) will not return because service is not like 5star, I rather spend it at shangrila.
9) it's not diverse or even warm and welcoming at all as per told in the advertisement.
10) rating 2/5 only

sample_comments.title: Quality of service has declined
sample_comments.text:
I stayed for CNY 2024 holidays. I learned the service has declined compared to my previous stay in 2023. Here are few things the management has to look into esp on the housekeeping part:
1. Hotel cleanliness is fair. I found thrash/garbage at the balcony. 
2. Shampoo and facial tissue were not refill on my first day of check in. I have to call front desk for refill. High-rated hotel is not expected to behave so poorly especially when the check in time is late at 4pm, customer would expect everything are in place by the time they enter the room.
3. My small request for extra drinking water bottles were denied by the housekeeping staff. I was told that I have to call front desk if I wanted additional drinking water. Im so upset that I was put in such situation just for requesting basic needs which is WATER! And plus the hotel does not provide water dispenser at each level, so more the reason customer shud be given EXTRA!
4. I was informed by staff at check in counter that rm 8 parking rate would be totally waived upon going out but I learned it is only partially waive rm 3. Staff should be well-verse on basic rules and inform customer correctly.
5. Breakfast buffet spread is so-so compared to my last stay.For the price charged, the food is not variety. Basic stuff like cheese was not available, proteins are limited, only served egg and processed meat at the western section.
6. On my last day of stay 12/2/2024, the ice cream and pancake section was closed until almost 8pm, i came at 6.54 am and my kids had to wait for almost 1 hour for pancake and eventually they gave up waiting and just had cereals.

sample_comments.title: Disappointing First Impression, lacking Hospitality
sample_comments.text:
We stayed here recently, and to be honest, it wasn't the best experience. We understood the 4pm check-in policy and tried not to arrive too early---got there around 3-something. The front desk was helpful and got us registered, but informed us the room wasn't ready yet. Fair enough, but what was frustrating was that we only got the key at 4:10pm, and that was after following up a second time. It really makes you wonder---were they only starting to clean rooms around 4:00pm? If they're short on staff, that's something management seriously needs to fix. Guests shouldn't be kept waiting, especially when check-out is at 12pm and there's plenty of buffer time.

That said, the front desk staff were polite and doing their best. One pleasant surprise was the room service---the food was actually decent and arrived in a reasonable time, which we appreciated.

The biggest letdown, though, was breakfast at Makan Kitchen. The person at the entrance asked for our room number and gave a quick greeting, but that was it---no one showed us to a table. I had to ask multiple times for a baby chair, and still got no help. The staff just seemed uninterested. That lack of engagement was obvious across the board---from the entrance to the food stations. No smiles, no eye contact, no effort to make guests feel welcome.

The breakfast itself? It was okay. Edible, but forgettable. Definitely not the highlight of the stay.

Overall, it wasn't a terrible experience, but it left a lot to be desired. If you're traveling with kids or expecting warm hospitality and good service, you might want to consider other options.
sample_comments.response:
Dear Elvin, Thank you for taking the time to leave a review, yet we are very sorry to hear that you haven't enjoyed your time with us. I would be happy to discuss your experience and review your feedback to ensure we improve, and hope that you can contact me at {email} with more information.
Kind Regards,
DoubleTree by Hilton Putrajaya Lakeside

On 11th November 2021 at 2.30 pm ill arrived at the hotel lobby. the receptionist mentioned to me starting from November the hotel check in time at 4pm. i was not being notice or inform regarding this changes. luckily my sister room is available at 3pm, my family and another family have to stay for a while at my sister room. I hope that the management could teach your staff to talk politely to the customer if there is an issue. the hotel keep the kids pool with SOP but the other pool without SOP and I'm wondering what is the function of the SOP. it should be applying to all pool as well.

In the morning, their IT reset network, I couldn't login, called careline and he told me username and password, all to say the whole process was nuisance. I told him, reset the whole network I need to go online to work. Then morning around 9plus two different staff kept knocking my door which I didn't even call for service or whatsoever. I told them go off as I need to work but still knock the door. It wasn't at all pleasant. Only the comfortable bed and pillow, the friendly front manager that made this stay a good one. Am not returning and not recommending to my friends.

sample_comments.title: Above average
sample_comments.text:
For legitimacy of feedback and easier reference for the hotel management to do their own internal investigation, I stayed in Room ***(check in: 9 August 2025; Check out: 11 August 2025). 

This is not my first time staying here but by far this is one of the worst ever experience staying in this hotel (or any hotel i've ever been to). On Saturday, it was already bad enough that the Check In time is at 4PM (normally in all other hotels i've been to it's 3pm latest), I arrived at close to 3pm and checked in at the reception and was told the room will be ready by 4pm and the hotel shall call me. I was totally fine with that since it's still early and I needed to register and collect my race kit for Man of Steel Putrajaya. 

I booked the Executive Deluxe with lounge access so my wife and 4 yr old son sat at the lounge (which has nothing except for Tea, Coffee and soft drinks) while I went to sort out my racekit collection. 

At 3.45pm i went and checked at the reception whether my room is ready and was informed not yet ready. I accepted it because it was still early but at 4.09pm i went to check again BUT the room is still not ready. The receptionist called the housekeeping crew (i assume) and i overheard their conversation that they have not even entered my room to clean. I was pissed and created a scene and immediately i was asked to step aside and I called for the manager on duty because it is just ridiculous when checkout time is at 12 noon but at 4.09pm they have not even started cleaning the room. Only when i lost my temper the manager on duty went to the room and checked the situation. At 4.24pm he came back and said my room is ready...finally. This is just ridiculous and i was told it's because the hotel is fully booked the day before. As the hotel guest I cannot accept that as an excuse because it is bad enough that their check in is later than normal hotel check in time and check out is maintained at 12 noon and the hotel management should revisit their process to turaround the rooms ASAP for the next guest instead of blaming it on hotel is fully occupied the day before. 

That was not how i picture the feeling of checking into a hotel that is priced at *** per night. I experienced better service at hotel priced at half the price!!

That was not the only incident that spoiled my experience in Double Tree Putrajaya. As I mentioned above, I checked in the hotel because I am doing the Man of Steel Putrajaya the next day on 10 August 2025 so it is easier for me to go to the starting point and also for the comfort and convenience of my wife and son during my race. Since the race starts early, my wife and I decided to just have dinner at the hotel (thinking that it would be more convenient and quick). We went to Makan Kitchen at the hotel at 7.50pm and there was quite a number of restaurant staff but it took them quite some time to even give us the food menu. We waited for more than 40 minutes to be served by the staff just to place our order and that was when I started to get mad. We can only order at 8.30pm. Bear in mind that I have a 4 year old boy who is hungry and he was already restless and agitated because of the long wait. 

It was bad enough that we waited 40 minutes just to order our food. We ordered Spaghetti Carbornara + Beef burger + 2 Drinks (that's all). After 10 minutes we were served only the drinks but since it was only 10 minutes we were still fine. After 30 minutes of waiting, we were served one small bowl of crisps and was told that our food will be a bit late. I was already frustrated because it was already 9pm by then and I still havent eaten and I need to sleep early for the race the next day. I asked the waitress to check and confirm when our food can be ready but she said she will check and lo n behold she was nowhere to be seen after that. She did not come back to tell us an estimated time. 

At 9.20pm I was already mad i asked to speak to the manager on duty and he came out from the kitc
sample_comments.response:
Dear Mr Rizal,

3. Awkward situation at Makan Kitchen, as 2 chef are sort of had intense arguments with each other bout a menu in front of the guest.

Overall, my expectation for Hilton hotel is dissapointing. My main point booked this hotel is for my child to enjoy around and the kids entertaiment. But endup is all so poor. I booked this hotel at very last minute, no super cheap discount. This is the most underrated DT i had been.

sample_comments.title: Overrated & misleads rating
sample_comments.text:
Not really a great experience over:
1) Difficult parking space A1 and non working all of the parking lift at level A2
2) Ignorance help desk. Report to them regarding parking issue and non working room phone, the responsive is just "Ok." Hence we repeated the complaints a few times in thought they didn't understand. End up it's actually the actual response
3) Overrated breakfast rating in all previous travellers comment. Breakfast is variety but low quality. No one will clean up your table/ used plates unless you call them. Ignorance staff. So so slow. Cleaning up one table after guest leave can take up to 20mins- 30mins. I well observed all the breakfast staff. I felt tired looking at them. Working, but with lazy face and irresponsive attitude. All not part or some.

Overall, very frustrated and not impressive at all. Should not gain high rating as high as 8.6 before. This hotel does not deserve that. In my honest opinion, this hotel is only fair to be rating at 6. 

Hope this helps other travellers and hotel management to improve their service and attitude

sample_comments.title: Unexpectedly disappointed
sample_comments.text:
Check in time supposed to be 4pm but it's still late than that due to the raya crowd. It's killing coz waiting at the hotel lobby which was hot like no air conditioning.

Checked in room and waited for the luggage During the waiting time found that the air conditioning doesn't function well and the tv can't on. 

Two hours later after pool time. The hotel room was hot like the moment we checked in. Tv battery changed and still cant on.

Lack of staff that's why it took times to get people to answer and technician to come. End up we insist to change another room instead of stay in the first room to OBSERVE 30-40min the aircond suggested by the technician.... The tv in the first room was actually not functioning. I'm not sure why the front desk didn't send technician to come over, she asked to change remote battery.

The staff told us to proceed at front desk. So much trouble when we go to the front desk and the girl doesn't seems to know what happened and I was being question why I change the room and did I inform? And her attitude was decently rude.

The new room was good if compare to the old one. Nothing complain.
But I got a call around 11pm saying that we can get complimentary late check out as compensation. Appreciated if they can call earlier as they have waken up everyone who sleep. 

Food was normal, and can see their manpower is super limited. 

The hotel facilities are aged. Some of the front desk staffs not well trained. Their manpower doesn't seems to cope with the raya crowd. 

Overall we are disappointed with the stay.
sample_comments.response:
Dear Judy, Thank you for sharing your feedback, and we truly apologize for the inconveniences you experienced during your stay. We understand how frustrating it must have been, especially given the delays at check-in, the issues with your room's air conditioning and TV, and the lack of support at times.

Please rest assured that your comments have been shared with our management team for review. We acknowledge the shortage of staff during the Raya season, which impacted our ability to respond quickly to your needs, and we're working hard to address these challenges moving forward.

We are grateful for your understanding regarding the room change, and we sincerely apologize for the confusion at the front desk and the inconvenience it caused. This is not the level of service we aim to provide, and we're taking steps to improve staff training and communication, especially during busy periods.

We are glad that your second room met your expectations and we hope that the complimentary late

sample_comments.title: Architecture wise is a pleasure to look at
sample_comments.text:
The building is stunning you can't get enough of how they are different in each parts but still retains it similarity in some ways. For example even in the same sections there are still differences of the layout like the windows structures. There are 3 connecting bridges between the buildings and they are so unique in their own ways. It took me a while to admire them all. 

Checking in was a breeze tho they say check in time is 4pm but we get to check in early and got those warm cookies. 

Room was surprisingly small but adequate for a night stay. Nothing that sets it apart (except the cookies) but maybe my choice of room was the cheapest one at that time so there's that.

Breakfast was chaotic. It was peak time (9 to 10) so there was a case of people from other table snatching away our cutleries. Sadly the porridge runs out fast and what's left is not warm anymore. Overall, a cornucopia of dishes. if one area is finished you can always opt for the other side that is still ongoing.

Gym was terrific, with abundance of fresh towels for both gym and pool. We spent swimming on the rooftop pool, suitable for adults. The hot 11AM sun pairs well with the water.

Don't forget to just chill with live music, sipping coffee from a cafe nearby at night in the lobby area!
sample_comments.response:
Dear Ms Kharunisa,
Thank you very much for taking the time to provide us your feedback about your recent stay in our hotel. It is very important for us to know your opinion as it is our aim to exceed and go beyond each guest's expectations. 
I have noted that you have evaluated the hotel layout, the room size, Breakfast Satisfaction and the other hotel facilities. May I kindly ask you to elaborate on what has dissatisfied you and what we could have done better in order to meet your expectations. This would assist us in reviewing our offerings and service and keep on improving them and ultimately to achieve 9/10 satisfaction from our guest.
We look forward to hear from you and we hope that there will be another opportunity to deliver the warm Hilton hospitality experience to you.

Regards,
Fida
Duty Manager

sample_comments.text: Ive been there for 3d2n. The hotel and facilities also the breakfast is average. My room booked for family deluxe and the room not as what i expected. The view facing the university and quiet. Boring environment n view from my room. Request for plate and spoon need to be sent to room but need to pay rm5.30 for delivery charges. Arcade room basket ball was teribble, token machine is outdated, money stuck inside, its like lack of maintenance over here and there. Ive been to the lobby during raining, and saw the towel been put at the door to avoid water seeping thru the door. For me the hotel was overated with 5 star hotel. They need to improve with maintenance work here and there. Staff also not friendly no eye contact during conversation. I hope they can improve more on the maintenance, cleanliness and etc for better rating.

sample_comments.text: I wasn't enjoying my stay as I was bitten by a bed bug on my legs. I couldn't sleep the whole night and went to the washroom multiple times to wash my legs and put some ointment on. The pillows are another nightmare as they are too soft to lay your head on. As a five-star hotel, they should have a selection of pillows to choose from. (I've stayed in a few hotels who offered pillows selections). Unfortunately, the breakfast experience was quite disappointing. The quality of the food was so-so, and to make matters worse, one of the breakfast staff displayed rude behavior. This definitely weakened my overall experience.

sample_comments.title: Different from the picture
sample_comments.text:
+ : Nice swimming pool for adult & child. Nice gym room. Steamboat buffet are nice with rm60+ per head.

- : The room inside NO sofa bed and NO round table. Different from the photos we booked. Toilet door not function, can't pull and stuck there. Pillow are too soft, will run aside. Floor carpet is old. Bed head is dusty. Kids play room need to pay additional per head even you are the guest. Morning breakfast is not much choice as compare with others same star hotel. sample_comments.title: Below expected
sample_comments.text:
Double Tree by Hilton Putrajaya Lakeside

Tarikh : 26 Jan-27 Jan 2022
Jenis bilik : K

Review
Reservation : 4/5
Smooth. Since this is only our shortstay for anniversary yang lepas..so pihak hotel deco swan at room for free tq.. 

Check in : ok 

Concierge 1/5
Time ni dtg takde..ada SG sorang tp tgh assist guest before our car.. so we decided parking terus dan berjalan la smpai ke hotel lobby..no lift ke lobby..
Since time arrived, bilik da ready..terus check in..and got the cookies 

Lobby : 4/5
Spacious, bersih ..tak packed dengan orang ramai. 

Area hotel :
-No usher to the unit..just staff bagi direction dr kaunter je..less signboard direction..ada few places under construction..no unit kecik2 pula. .so kita end up pusing2 bawah ke sini sana..with our heavy bag..klu tau unit jauh..we will request for bellman cart..sigh.. ada link bridge lagi utk ke unit.
Staff ada pass by us..tp they all dont bother much tgk guest jalan sana-sini cari lift 

Malam tu; i and my husband went out for dinner.. bole plak bridge link door nak ke lift di kunci..so we all tercari2 lif utk ke g/floor..jumpa la lift utk kitchen/construction ..turun je la pakai lift tu..
Not advisable jalan sorang2 la sbb sunyi hotel tu.

Parking : 3/5
RM 5 chargeable.

Room : 1/5
Bukak pintu je...no fragrance smell..etc..
Sanitize sticker ada.
Surprise deco swan 
Shower, ok.but limited space.
.lebih kurang 3 star hotel
ada iron & board provided; takde robe.
Ada couch but view ..
suitable for 2pax

Advantage :
Ada splash pool for kids and adult pool tp da rundown emotion dgn tercari2 unit time check in..takde mood nak amik pic and swim..
Sesuai juga bagi yg nak ootd/igfriendlyview 
For business traveller too ~

Yang tak best, petang tu hujan lebat..so our unit carpet basah near the window.. we call up and technician dtg..tp rasa malas nak packing brg n change room (itu pun based on availablity) .so stay je la the same unit...mntak courtesy late check o

sample_comments.title: Above average
sample_comments.text:
Pros:
The room is very spacious, modern, and aesthetically pleasing.
The overall design of the hotel is nice.
Cons:
Cleanliness/Allergies: The room was extremely dusty. I had a very bad allergic reaction because of this. For a hotel at this price point, the hygiene standards should be much higher.
Service: Housekeeping is quite slow; I had to call them several times before getting a response.
Dining: We stayed during Ramadan, and the Sahoor selection was disappointing. There was much less variety compared to the regular breakfast spread.
Facilities: The kids' pool was closed during our stay, which was a letdown for the family.
Verdict:
Overall, the stay was okay, but it's definitely not worth the premium price given the service gaps and the dust issues. I expected better from the DoubleTree brand.
sample_comments.response:
Dear Hajar,

Thank you for sharing your feedback with us. We're glad to hear you liked the room design and overall ambiance of the hotel.

We're truly sorry to hear about the cleanliness concerns, service delays, and your experience during Sahoor, as well as the inconvenience caused by the kids' pool closure. This is certainly not the experience we aim to provide.

Your feedback is important to us, and we will be reviewing these areas for improvement. We hope to have the opportunity to welcome you again for a better stay in the future.

Kind Regards,
DoubleTree by Hilton Putrajaya Lakeside

sample_comments.title: Not Worth the Price
sample_comments.text:
The hotel lobby was confusing because the property is divided by towers, making the walk from the parking area to the lobby quite far. This stay was meant to celebrate my wife's birthday, and I requested a simple decoration or complimentary item, as most hotels usually provide --- but we received nothing. I even noticed other guests getting cakes and special treatment at the café during buffet dinner, but not us, even though we book the dinner buffet as well.

The room was disappointing. Not expecting that it is too small, located at the corner, and not worth the price (over RM500). Cleanliness was terrible. the bathroom and even the lifts were dirty. The water pressure was weak and not up to hotel standards.

The receptionist wasn't friendly either. When my wife queued to check in, she was ignored, while a foreign guest who came later was attended to immediately.

On the positive side, the buffet dinner was great, delicious food and friendly, helpful staff. However, the breakfast experience was poor. When I requested a baby chair, the staff said they would bring one "if available," but later I saw them give one to another guest who just arrived. My child is only 2 years old --- sitting without a baby chair wasn't practical. The breakfast food was average, with too many breads and pastries, not enough local variety like kuih muih tradisional and the taste wasn't great.

Given the overall experience, I wouldn't consider staying here again.
sample_comments.response:
Dear Fazry,

Thank you for taking the time to share your feedback following your recent stay. We regret to learn that certain aspects of your experience did not meet your expectations, particularly in regard to cleanliness, service consistency, and the birthday arrangement request. Please be assured that your comments have been shared with the relevant departments for review and improvement.

We are, however, pleased to note that you enjoyed our dinner buffet and appreciated the hospitality of our team. Your feedback is important to us as we continuously strive to enhance our guest experience.

We hope to have the opportunity to welcome you back in the future and provide you with an improved and more enjoyable stay.

Kind Regards,
DoubleTree by Hilton Putrajaya Lakeside

sample_comments.title: Family Trip

Swimming pool area should be clean up frequently and staff should be around to help with the pool towels. As we couldnt get towels and end up going to the room wet.

Dinner was perfect, staff in the restaurant are very initiative and helpful. Manage to talk and share experience with Aiman(F&B) and their assistant manager (girl). 

Breakfast is good, alot of variety and theres a suggested times to go for to avoid the peak time. Saddiq(F&B) was helpful and kind to entertain our table during the breakfast.

sample_comments.title: There were cockroaches

Kids waterpark was crowded (but it was a school holiday so yeah). As a compensation to our bad experience they gave us drink vouchers to be used at their cafe. Overall, would not recommend going again.

sample_comments.title: Hotel was great but staff need to improve
sample_comments.text: The hotel is nice. My children really happy with the splash pool. But sadly need to improve for the staff at the reception counter since they are the face of hotel since customer will meet them first. There are misunderstanding about deposit and the staff really arrogant to explain to us as we know that we are not rich people and look like kampung people. Maybe she judge us from the way of clothing that we wore on that day.

sample_comments.title: Won't repeat
sample_comments.text: For the two rooms and price I've paid of over rm1k, not worth at all. Even paid for included dinner but have to wait almost an hour eventhough we already made order beforehand from the room (supposedly buffet but cancelled due to less people). Check in 3pm and despite we arrived on time, rooms aren't ready and have to wait until 4.30pm. Rooms are clean but had old 'carpet' weird smell and overall nothing that great. Too much excuses given and understaffs. We came from far this really burnt us out just by all the waiting and less available time for my kids to play at the pools. The only good things here are great breakfast choices that's superbly delicious and late check out (which we definitely deserve) but we can't enjoy the extra time at the pool as 12 noon is the pool cleaning time.

However, the infinity pool is filthy with lots of algae and not suitable for swimming. Rooftop pool is not accessible for kids below 16 which is kinda disappointing because lower ground pool below is super filthy. So not many option for older children to swim if not keen for waterpark. All in all, its a good getaway in the city and can be better if the pool is clean.

sample_comments.title: Great Stay but not satisfied with the staff.
sample_comments.text: We had a great staycation for one night. Room cleanliness (super clean), breakfast are great, kids waterpark, kids club, hotel surrounding cleanliness, the calmness are top notch. Even the beds & pillow are one of the best hotel we experience. But! People comes for experience. We ask for simple complimentary for our anniversary, has been remark during booking, even at the counter during check in, but it has been denied by the hotel staff & not even try to entertained us. The staff are great people, but not helping. Park Royal & Shangrila are the best. They go way beyond to entertained customer. It's just a simple gesture for invite us again to the hotel. Overall, the hotel experienced is just ok for us. Nothing to be remember so much.
sample_comments.response:
Dear Mohd,

Thank you for sharing your feedback. We are glad you enjoyed the room cleanliness, breakfast, kids' facilities, and the comfort of our beds and pillows.

We are truly sorry, however, for the disappointment regarding your anniversary request. We understand how special such occasions are and regret that we did not make the extra effort to celebrate with you. Please accept our sincere apologies.

Your comments have been shared with our team to improve how we handle guest requests in the future. We hope to have another chance to provide you with a more memorable experience on your next stay.

Kind Regards,
DoubleTree by Hilton Putrajaya Lakeside

sample_comments.title: A Scene that should never happen in a 5-Star.
sample_comments.text:
The Hotels review seems good with a strong Claim of Excellent Breakfast, we decided and our High Expectations was met with Extreme Dissappintment.

The overall facilities is Nice. On the contrary, I specifically highlight the F&B section. it's the worse beyond reproach.

I simply could not believe a 5-Star Standard Hotel could serve meals in such manner. Please refer to the pictures attached. I made a simple order of 3 eggs in Bulls Eye Style. The picture is what came when I collected. In the Chinese Porridge Section, the Century Egga placed in the highest regard is already rotten. I simply could not comprehend how could such things happen in this Hotel. the picture is how it looks like.

Apart from the food the serve, hygiene and cleanliness is utmost important. Reference picture of "Highly Skilled" chefs that could not even understand the basic level of hygiene. Perhaps they forgot to close their mouth. In fact almost all the chef are talking and cooking.
So much for Excellent Breakfast.

I ended up with Food Poisoning.

When I raised the matter to the hotel, I was greeted as if the matter was of no importance and urgency. 

Probably I didn't appear to be highly Glamorous. So probably in order to pass off the matter I was awarded with 2 free complimentary meals for Dinner.

Who in the Right Frame of mind will return again for another round of " Excellent Meal " experience that might end up in a journey to the Emergency Hospital.
sample_comments.response:
Dear Andrew., 
Thank you for your review. Our team was truly happy to be at your service. We look forward to welcoming you again soon with a warm cookie!
Kind Regards,
DoubleTree by Hilton Putrajaya Lakeside

sample_comments.title: Not worth the 1k room per night
sample_comments.text: Booked a family room for 1k per night for 3 because online reviews painted this place as the best in putrajaya. Lets start with the pros: excellent staff (esp Mr Rafie at lobby), sumptuous spread for breakfast. Now for the cons: Hotel is spaced out - a lot to walk between different wings. There was some kind of event the night we stayed and people were literally screaming for hours outside our room. Hotel staff could have put us in another wing (as the hotel is so huge) far away from the noisy event. The group screaming/cheering went on past 11:30 pm. The hotel is an old, tired building - not kept up well. For eg our family room, the bathroom glass shower door was broken at the bottom so water would seep into the whole bathroom after a bath. Shockingly bad upkeep. I had booked for a family of three yet amenities (towel, toothbrush etc)provided was for two. Got a text from hotel asking if everything was good and i told them abt this. They delivered an extra toothbrush. I had to then ask for another towel. V substandard care for a 5 star hotel. Do not believe the reviews. Not worth it for RM1K per night. Next time I come, I will stay at the Marriott instead.
sample_comments.response:
Dear Miriam, Thank you for taking the time to share your detailed feedback. We're glad to hear that you appreciated our staff, especially Mr. Rafie, and enjoyed the breakfast spread. We apologize for the inconvenience caused by the noise during your stay. We understand how disruptive that can be, and we will certainly consider your comments about room placement during future events. We're also sorry to hear about the issues with the bathroom and the amenities. Your comments regarding the upkeep and service have been shared with the relevant teams to ensure improvements are made. We sincerely regret that your experience did not meet your expectations, and we hope you'll reconsider staying with us in the future, as we continually work to enhance our guests' experiences. We truly appreciate your feedback, as it helps us grow. Kind Regards,
DoubleTree by Hilton Putrajaya Lakeside

sample_comments.title: Check in process is late and slow
sample_comments.text:
Check-in time is already set at 4 PM, which is quite late, but we arrived around 2 PM, hoping the room would be ready soon. However, even after waiting past 4 PM, our room was still not available, which is unacceptable for a five-star hotel. We got our room key around 4.15pm.

In terms of facilities, the splash pool is relatively small compared to DoubleTree Daman Laut, and the water pressure for most of the splash features seemed weak.

Since we only stayed for one night and check-in was delayed, we had very limited time to explore other facilities.
sample_comments.response:
Dear Gan,

Thank you for sharing your experience with us. We sincerely apologize for the delay in your check-in, as we understand how frustrating that must have been, especially when expecting a smooth arrival. Your feedback on the splash pool size and water pressure is also noted, and we will review these areas for improvement. We truly appreciate your input and hope to have the opportunity to provide you with a better experience in the future.

Kind Regards,
DoubleTree by Hilton Putrajaya Lakeside

Arrived hotel aound 4pm , counter full with check in guest , but check in process just took around 10 to 15 mins , after go up to the room found that swimming suit all inside luggage , so went down to collect my luggage , inside the room full with bags that need to send to the room , on my way up elevator suddenly shake and stop for a minute , luckily after sound the alarm someone set to lower the elevator to G floor let me out .

way to the room is another nightmare , had to take the elevator to 1st floor the link to another building via bridge , then use another elevator again only can reach the floor , and all the elevator not protected by keycard , anyone can walk in then wandering around without any obstacle. the hotel room look like a mage game.

sample_comments.title: Stop over stay
sample_comments.text: First timer staying at this hotel, friend recommended. This 2 bedroom suite come with free access to executive lounge for breakfast and high tea. I went to Makan place for breakfast as they have more variety, there is a female staff at makan place was showing very bad attitude when my mum and I were talking to her. If next time I were to stay here, I will choose to go to the executive lounge for my breakfast. Overall stay is great.
sample_comments.response:
Dear Cledwyn,
Greeting from DoubleTree by Hilton Putrajaya Lakeside. Thank you for taking your invaluable time to share your kind feedback with us. We are delighted to hear you enjoyed your stay at our hotel. However, I am sorry to read that our staff had caused an inconvenience during your stay, and I would like to apologize in regard to that matter. With the help of your feedback, we can improve our future services and facilities and we will do our utmost to offer you the best service next. We hope to welcome you again soon in our hotel!
Kind Regards,
DoubleTree by Hilton Putrajaya Lakeside

sample_comments.title: Something wrong somewhere
sample_comments.text:
King Family room

1. Huge. Since written 4 Adult. Should put 2 Bed. Instead of only 1 King.

2. If we choose the room include breakfast, should give the free breakfast follow the quantity accomodate person. Bila book di agoda, if tak perasan u isi untuk 1 or 2 person shj, u will get that quantity of free breakfast. Ni tak tau agoda or hotel punya rules. Maybe salah customer tak perasan, But at least bila dah check in tu, bg lah compliment skit, diskaun ke.. Instead of kene byr full follow the walk in price. 

3. Kids love the kids room. But operating hour start at 10am. Should be open earlier since check out time 12

4. Hotel gah. Environment cosy. Sesuai tuk family with kids. Santai, relax.

5. Time breakfast ada kucing dtg naik meja amik makanan dr pinggan my hubby sewaktu dia pergi ambil makanan lain. He informed the staff about it but the staff just ignored. Time check out pun, the trolley came, maybe barang kami banyak sgt, the helper tu muka tak peramah langsung. I know it was peak hour, but at least kene ada adab customer service. Tang tu sangat kecewa. So, only 1 star for the staff

Ada kurang sana sini, but berbaloi untuk dtg lagi. In shaa Allah. Hopefully next time bila i book lagi, all the negative parts akan improve.

Greeting from DoubleTree by Hilton Putrajaya Lakeside. Thank you for taking your invaluable time to share your constructive feedback with us. Greetings from DoubleTree by Hilton Putrajaya Lakeside. sample_comments.title: Child pool is under mainteance
sample_comments.text:
As i was booking this hotel , i was exicted for childeren pool area , but that closed and there no intimiation about this to us neither on webiste and nor on agoda , i feel like i have been scammed , i thought my kid would be very happy see all those , but none of these things happen. 
i never expect this from hilton and agoda. 

i hope this would be mentioned i would never paid this huge amount for the night.
sample_comments.response:
Dear Akash,

Thank you for sharing your feedback regarding your recent stay with us. We sincerely regret that your experience did not meet your expectations, especially concerning the children's Splash Pool area. We understand how disappointing it is when family plans are disrupted.

We would like to gently clarify that we aim for full transparency regarding our facility maintenance. On 20 February, we issued a formal notification stating that the Splash Pool would be closed for essential works from 23 February until 18 March. This message was sent to ensure our guests were informed prior to the closure period.

We apologize if this communication did not reach you through your booking channel or if it was overlooked, as it was certainly our intention to provide you with this information before your arrival.

Your feedback regarding the visibility of these alerts on third-party platforms like Agoda is invaluable, and we will work closely with them to ensure such notices are as prominent

sample_comments.title: Hotel 5 star tapi ..
sample_comments.text:
Bayar hotel 5 star ni untuk harga hampir RM 500 rasa macam terlalu overrated. Sejujurnya expectation tinggi sangat sebab tengok dalam google tempat cantik, ada pool untuk budak2, fasiliti game semua ada. Tapi bila masuk je, ada problem dengan kad yang dia bagi. Kena turun tukar dekat lobby dulu. Kata boleh guna kunci pakai apps pon hampeh, tak boleh nak akses walaupon try banyak kali. 

Request untuk simple birthday celebration, tapi dapat 2 belon + tuala bentuk bear. Faham percuma tapi hopefully dapat properkan sikit deco tu. Hotel mahal so first impression tu penting. 

Dalam apps hilton kata boleh pilih bilik sehari sebelum. Tapi bila dah sampai receptionis dia bagi bilik lain tanpa inform. Bila tanya, baru dia kata bilik tu tak sell sebab ada defect. Sepatutnya tutup siap2 dalam apps, penat la berharap lepastu tak dapat, and takde inform pon tentang tu sampai kita sendiri tanya. 

Masuk bilik pon kurang puas hati, plastik sampah tak bagi, lantai stain teruk. 

Nasib baik katil empuk, bantal sedap dan fasiliti kids room selesa.
sample_comments.response:
Dear Wan, thank you for taking the time to share your detailed feedback. We sincerely apologize for the issues you experienced with the room key, app access, and room allocation. We understand how first impressions are important, and we regret that some aspects of your stay did not meet your expectations. Your comments about room cleanliness have been shared with our housekeeping team to ensure improvements are made. Regarding the birthday decoration, please note that this is a complimentary service and is subject to availability. Due to the high number of requests, we provide a simple setup, and we appreciate you're understanding.
On the positive side, we're glad to hear that you found the bed and pillows comfortable and that the kids' facilities were enjoyable. We truly value your input and hope to welcome you back for an even better stay in the future. Kind regards, DoubleTree by Hilton Putrajaya Lakeside

sample_comments.title: Improvement in Facility Maintenance
sample_comments.text:
While I appreciate the service efforts, I was somewhat disappointed with the overall condition of the facilities. The lifts and common floor areas appeared old and not well maintained, with cleanliness levels falling below what I would expect from a five-star hotel.

In addition, the room assigned to me (Room 5212) did not have a balcony, and the room size was noticeably smaller compared to other rooms, which affected my overall comfort during the stay.

That said, I would like to compliment the hotel on the dinner and breakfast buffet offerings. Both were enjoyable, of good quality, and certainly worth the price. This was a positive highlight of my experience.

I hope this feedback is taken constructively, as I believe improvements in facility maintenance and room allocation would greatly enhance the guest experience and better reflect the hotel's five-star positioning.
sample_comments.response: Dear Jeng, thank you for taking the time to share your feedback. We truly appreciate your compliments about our service efforts, as well as your positive comments on the dinner and breakfast buffet offerings. We are glad to hear that these aspects of your stay were enjoyable! However, we sincerely apologize for the areas that did not meet your expectations. We understand that the condition of the lifts and common areas, as well as the cleanliness in certain areas, were below the standard you expected. Please be assured that we are actively working on maintenance and improvements to enhance the overall guest experience. Regarding your room, we're sorry for the disappointment you experienced with the size and the absence of a balcony. We understand that room comfort is essential, and we will ensure that future guests are given room options that better meet their preferences. Thank you again for your valuable feedback. We are committed to improving and hope to welcome you back in the futu
